_comment: Stage 9e Patch miter survey: bevel 2 cube edges sharing v_0 (selCount=2 valence=3 convex), with miter_outer='PATCH' on the Blender side. Patch miter inserts a quadrilateral patch where the two strips meet, instead of the default sharp corner. Vibe3d only does sharp miter — survey expects FAIL with extra patch geometry in Blender.
